entries.source: Live modes, guides, and workflows related to this comparison.
entries.value: Modhanna beo, treoracha, agus sreafaí oibre a bhaineann leis an gcomparáid seo.

entries.source: LLMs, crawlers, and learners can follow the sitemap, RSS feed, llms.txt, and JSON content index.
entries.value: Is féidir le LLManna, crawlers, agus foghlaimeoirí an sitemap, fotha RSS, llms.txt, agus innéacs ábhair JSON a leanúint.

entries.source: llms.txt, llms-full.txt, and ai-content-index.json summarize public pages, routes, modes, guides, and citation boundaries for assistants.
entries.value: Déanann llms.txt, llms-full.txt, agus ai-content-index.json achoimre ar leathanaigh phoiblí, bealaí, modhanna, treoracha, agus teorainneacha lua do chúntóirí.
Féach níos géire agus tabhair níos mó faoi deara
Féach níos géire agus tabhair níos mó faoi deara.

entries.source: Machine-readable catalog of public pages, modes, learning paths, blog clusters, and indexing boundaries.
entries.value: Catalóg inléite ag meaisín de leathanaigh phoiblí, modhanna, conairí foghlama, braislí blag, agus teorainneacha innéacsaithe.

entries.source: Maintain simulation state across turns: location, time, identity, money, inventory, relationships, reputation, risk, event clock, field notes, and evidence confidence. Apply realistic consequences in strict mode.
entries.value: Coinnigh staid an insamhlaithe trasna sealanna: suíomh, am, féiniúlacht, airgead, fardal, caidrimh, clú, riosca, clog imeachta, nótaí allamuigh, agus muinín fianaise. Cuir iarmhairtí réalaíocha i bhfeidhm i mód dian.

entries.source: Maintain two layers: an in-character voice bounded by the selected time and worldview, and a historian sidecar that flags documented fact, plausible reconstruction, contested interpretation, modern paraphrase, anachronism, and uncertainty. Let the person resist, challenge, evade, ask questions back, or reject false premises when historically fitting.
entries.value: Coinnigh dhá shraith: guth i gcarachtar teorannaithe ag an am agus an radharc domhanda roghnaithe, agus sidecar staraí a mharcálann fíric dhoiciméadaithe, atógáil inchreidte, léirmhíniú conspóideach, athinsint nua-aimseartha, anacrónachas, agus éiginnteacht. Lig don duine cur ina aghaidh, dúshlán a thabhairt, seachaint, ceisteanna a chur ar ais, nó premísí bréagacha a dhiúltú nuair atá sé oiriúnach go stairiúil.

entries.source: Make a mixed math practice test
Make civics practical, nonpartisan, and understandable.
entries.value: Déan cathartha praiticiúil, neamhpháirteach, agus intuigthe.

entries.source: Make confusion easier to talk about
entries.value: Déan mearbhall níos éasca le plé

entries.source: Make every learning session end with a test, artifact, or review step.
entries.value: Déan cinnte go gcríochnaíonn gach seisiún foghlama le tástáil, déantán, nó céim athbhreithnithe.

entries.source: Make flashcards from errors and revisit them after a delay.
entries.value: Déan luaschártaí as earráidí agus fill orthu tar éis moille.

entries.source: Make flashcards from errors, hesitation, formulas, definitions, and concepts you could not explain clearly.
entries.value: Déan luaschártaí as earráidí, leisce, foirmlí, sainmhínithe, agus coincheapa nárbh fhéidir leat a mhíniú go soiléir.

entries.source: Make learning feel like a game with quests, levels, points, challenges, and boss rounds.
entries.value: Cuir cuma cluiche ar an bhfoghlaim le tóraíochtaí, leibhéil, pointí, dúshláin agus babhtaí boss.

entries.source: Make mistakes come back at the right time
entries.value: Cuir botúin ar ais ag an am ceart

entries.source: Make music theory practical and audible in the learner's imagination.
entries.value: Déan teoiric cheoil praiticiúil agus inchloiste i samhlaíocht an fhoghlaimeora.

entries.source: Make one small change and test the result.
entries.value: Déan athrú beag amháin agus tástáil an toradh.

entries.source: Make one strong counterargument per turn, ask for rebuttals, and track the strongest claims on both sides.
entries.value: Déan frithargóint láidir amháin in aghaidh an tseala, iarr frithfhreagraí, agus rianaigh na maímh is láidre ar an dá thaobh.

entries.source: Make roles for a study group
Make sense of numbers and charts
entries.value: Bain ciall as uimhreacha agus cairteacha

entries.source: Make sense of numbers and charts.
entries.value: Déan ciall d’uimhreacha agus de chairteacha.

entries.source: Make the AI test your thinking
entries.value: Cuir ar an IS do smaointeoireacht a thástáil

entries.source: Make the habit visible and easy to restart.
entries.value: Déan an nós infheicthe agus éasca le hatosú.
Déan an obair bhaile úsáideach amárach

entries.source: Make the session leave evidence of learning.
entries.value: Déan cinnte go bhfágann an seisiún fianaise foghlama.
Déan an mhír seo níos soiléire

entries.source: Making claims precise, checking evidence, finding assumptions, and improving reasoning quality.
entries.value: Maímh a dhéanamh beacht, fianaise a sheiceáil, toimhdí a aimsiú, agus cáilíocht réasúnaíochta a fheabhsú.

entries.source: Many learners search by comparing tools they already know. A clear comparison page helps them choose the right learning behavior without hiding the tradeoffs.
entries.value: Cuardaíonn go leor foghlaimeoirí trí uirlisí atá ar eolas acu cheana a chur i gcomparáid. Cuidíonn leathanach comparáide soiléir leo an t-iompar foghlama ceart a roghnú gan na malairtí a cheilt.

entries.source: Map course structure, prioritize workload, and maintain a weekly plan.
entries.value: Mapaigh struchtúr cúrsa, cuir ualach oibre in ord tosaíochta, agus coinnigh plean seachtainiúil.

entries.source: Map courses, units, assignments, resources, and weekly workload into one organized study system.
entries.value: Leag amach cúrsaí, aonaid, tascanna, acmhainní agus ualach oibre seachtainiúil i gcóras staidéir eagraithe amháin.

entries.source: Map how ideas relate, from causes and effects to categories, examples, and contradictions.
entries.value: Léarscáiligh an bhaint atá ag smaointe lena chéile, ó chúiseanna agus éifeachtaí go catagóirí, samplaí agus contrárthachtaí.

entries.source: Map one misconception and the evidence that repairs it.
entries.value: Mapaigh míthuiscint amháin agus an fhianaise a dheisíonn í.

entries.source: Map the causes of World War I
entries.value: Mapáil cúiseanna an Chéad Chogaidh Dhomhanda
Leag amach topaicí do gach ábhar

entries.source: Math help is strongest when the learner can see the next move, explain why it works, and catch the mistake before it repeats.
entries.value: Bíonn cabhair mhatamaitice is láidre nuair is féidir leis an bhfoghlaimeoir an chéad bheart eile a fheiceáil, míniú cén fáth a n-oibríonn sé, agus an botún a ghabháil sula ndéanann sé athrá.

entries.source: Math help, writing feedback, code tutoring, history context, homework hints, and exam prep are separate needs.
entries.value: Is riachtanais ar leith iad cabhair mhatamaitice, aiseolas scríbhneoireachta, teagasc cód, comhthéacs staire, leideanna obair bhaile, agus ullmhúchán scrúduithe.

entries.source: Math Step Coach For Solving Problems With Understanding
entries.value: Math Step Coach chun Fadhbanna a Réiteach le Tuiscint

entries.source: Math Step Coach For Solving Problems With Understanding is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Solve math by understanding each step. Your coach checks your work, points out slips, and builds confidence.
entries.value: Is bealach dírithe é Math Step Coach chun Fadhbanna a Réiteach le Tuiscint chun IS a úsáid don fhoghlaim seachas bailiú freagraí éighníomhach. Tá an mód tógtha timpeall ar phost ar leith: réitigh matamaitic trí gach céim a thuiscint. Seiceálann do chóitseálaí do chuid oibre, aimsíonn sé sleamhnuithe, agus tógann sé muinín.

entries.source: Math Step Coach For Understanding: practical guide
entries.value: Math Step Coach don Tuiscint: treoir phraiticiúil

entries.source: Math Step Coach prompts and study loop
entries.value: Prasaí agus lúb staidéir Math Step Coach

entries.source: Math, science, coding, data, and technical reasoning modes that slow problems down into learnable steps.
entries.value: Modhanna matamaitice, eolaíochta, códaithe, sonraí, agus réasúnaíochta teicniúla a mhoillíonn fadhbanna ina gcéimeanna infhoghlamtha.

entries.source: Math, writing, coding, history, homework, and exam prep each need a different kind of help. These pages route learners into the public mode, prompt, guide, and review loop that fits.
entries.value: Teastaíonn cineál difriúil cabhrach ó mhatamaitic, scríbhneoireacht, códú, stair, obair bhaile, agus ullmhúchán scrúduithe. Treoraíonn na leathanaigh seo foghlaimeoirí isteach sa mhód poiblí, pras, treoir, agus lúb athbhreithnithe a oireann.

entries.source: Math, writing, coding, history, homework, and exam prep each need different behavior. These public subject hubs connect the search intent to live modes, prompts, guides, and review loops.
entries.value: Teastaíonn iompar éagsúil ó mhatamaitic, scríbhneoireacht, códú, stair, obair bhaile, agus ullmhúchán scrúduithe. Ceanglaíonn na moil ábhair phoiblí seo intinn chuardaigh le móid bheo, leideanna, treoracha, agus lúba athbhreithnithe.

entries.source: Media notes, source links, citation facts, and official reference URLs for inspir, the free AI-powered learning platform.
entries.value: Nótaí meán, naisc fhoinse, fíricí lua, agus URLanna tagartha oifigiúla do inspir, an t-ardán foghlama saor in aisce faoi chumhacht IS.

entries.source: Memory Palace AI Learning Mode is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Convert facts, lists, speeches, or sequences into memorable mental scenes.

entries.source: Mindset Reflection AI Learning Mode is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Notice what helps you learn, what gets in the way, and how to become a stronger learner.
entries.value: Is bealach dírithe é Mód Foghlama IS Mindset Reflection chun IS a úsáid don fhoghlaim seachas bailiú freagraí éighníomhach. Tá an mód tógtha timpeall ar phost ar leith: tabhair faoi deara cad a chabhraíonn leat foghlaim, cad a théann sa bhealach, agus conas a bheith i d’fhoghlaimeoir níos láidre.

entries.source: Misconception Doctor AI Learning Mode is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Say what you think is happening, and your buddy diagnoses hidden misconceptions with gentle tests.
entries.value: Is bealach dírithe é Mód Foghlama IS Misconception Doctor chun IS a úsáid don fhoghlaim seachas bailiú freagraí éighníomhach. Tá an mód tógtha timpeall ar phost ar leith: abair cad a cheapann tú atá ag tarlú, agus déanann do chara diagnóis ar mhíthuiscintí ceilte le tástálacha séimhe.

entries.value: Níos mó ná 100 treoir, lúb pras, agus braisle colúin don fhoghlaim le cabhair IS.

entries.source: Motivation Coach AI Learning Mode is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Get unstuck emotionally, find a smaller next step, and rebuild momentum without guilt.
entries.value: Is bealach dírithe é Mód Foghlama IS Motivation Coach chun IS a úsáid don fhoghlaim seachas bailiú freagraí éighníomhach. Tá an mód tógtha timpeall ar phost ar leith: éirigh as bheith greamaithe go mothúchánach, aimsigh chéad chéim níos lú, agus atóg móiminteam gan chiontacht.

entries.value: Bog ó thaighde teagascóra IS isteach i mód beo a mhúineann trí mhíniú, ceisteanna, agus cleachtadh.

entries.source: Move from pilot to wider access through school funding, partner support, or CSR pathways for learners who need subsidised access.
entries.value: Bog ó phíolóta go rochtain níos leithne trí mhaoiniú scoile, tacaíocht chomhpháirtithe, nó conairí CSR d’fhoghlaimeoirí a dteastaíonn rochtain fhóirdheonaithe uathu.

entries.source: Move from public testing to school deployment
entries.value: Bog ó thástáil phoiblí go himlonnú scoile

entries.source: Move from reading into active practice with a live public learning mode.
entries.value: Bog ó léamh isteach i gcleachtadh gníomhach le mód foghlama poiblí beo.

entries.source: Move into Socratic questions, quizzes, flashcards, debate, role-play, and guided instruction.
entries.value: Bog isteach i gceisteanna Sócraiteacha, tráth na gceist, luaschártaí, díospóireacht, rólghlacadh, agus teagasc treoraithe.

entries.source: Move school-specific privacy, access, and deployment questions to the schools pathway.
entries.value: Bog ceisteanna príobháideachais, rochtana, agus imlonnaithe atá sonrach don scoil chuig conair na scoileanna.

entries.source: Move through the path in three focused steps.
entries.value: Bog tríd an gconair i dtrí chéim dhírithe.

entries.source: Music Theory Coach AI Learning Mode is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Learn notes, chords, scales, rhythm, ear training ideas, and how songs are built.
entries.value: Is bealach dírithe é Mód Foghlama IS Music Theory Coach chun IS a úsáid don fhoghlaim seachas bailiú freagraí éighníomhach. Tá an mód tógtha timpeall ar phost ar leith: foghlaim nótaí, cordaí, scálaí, rithim, smaointe oiliúna cluaise, agus conas a thógtar amhráin.

entries.value: Mód Foghlama IS Music Theory Coach: treoir phraiticiúil

entries.value: Prasaí agus lúb staidéir Music Theory Coach

entries.source: My exam is on this date. Here is the syllabus, my weak areas, and my available time. Make a realistic plan with daily recall.
entries.value: Tá mo scrúdú ar an dáta seo. Seo é an siollabas, mo réimsí laga, agus an t-am atá ar fáil agam. Déan plean réalaíoch le haisghairm laethúil.

entries.source: Name a real or fictional personality and debate them on any topic. The AI channels their public style and worldview while keeping the debate fair.
entries.value: Ainmnigh pearsantacht fhíor nó fhicseanúil agus déan díospóireacht leo ar ábhar ar bith. Cuireann an AI a stíl phoiblí agus a ndearcadh domhanda in iúl agus coinníonn sé an díospóireacht cothrom.

entries.source: Name patterns, choose strategies, plan experiments, and review outcomes.
entries.value: Ainmnigh patrúin, roghnaigh straitéisí, pleanáil turgnaimh, agus athbhreithnigh torthaí.

entries.source: Name the exact operation, theorem, or step that feels uncertain.
entries.value: Ainmnigh an oibríocht, teoirim, nó céim chruinn a mhothaíonn éiginnte.

entries.source: Name the exact stuck point before asking for help.
entries.value: Ainmnigh an pointe greamaithe cruinn sula n-iarrann tú cabhair.

entries.source: Name the misconception or assumption that changed.
entries.value: Ainmnigh an mhíthuiscint nó an toimhde a d’athraigh.

entries.source: Name the subject and learner need.
entries.value: Ainmnigh an t-ábhar agus riachtanas an fhoghlaimeora.

entries.source: Name the topic or skill you want to understand.
entries.value: Ainmnigh an t-ábhar nó an scil ba mhaith leat a thuiscint.

entries.source: Need a first step right now?

Never present generated dialogue as authenticated quotation. Do not sanitize harmful views or glorify oppression, casteism, racism, slavery, misogyny, authoritarianism, or violence. Context should clarify without excusing. Do not give medical, legal, financial, or harmful advice through the persona. Preserve the difference between learning from a historical person and endorsing them.
entries.value: Ná cuir dialóg ghinte i láthair riamh mar lua fíordheimhnithe. Ná glan ná déan maolú ar dhearcaí díobhálacha ná ná glóirigh cos ar bolg, casteachas, ciníochas, sclábhaíocht, míognaí, údarásaíochas, ná foréigean. Ba chóir don chomhthéacs soiléiriú gan leithscéal a dhéanamh. Ná tabhair comhairle leighis, dlí, airgeadais, ná dhíobhálach tríd an bpearsa. Caomhnaigh an difríocht idir foghlaim ó dhuine stairiúil agus tacú leis.

entries.source: Never reveal future answers. Avoid trick questions unless the topic calls for advanced challenge.
entries.value: Ná nocht freagraí amach anseo riamh. Seachain ceisteanna cleasa mura n-éilíonn an t-ábhar dúshlán ardleibhéil.

entries.source: New inspir users and learners building a better AI learning habit from the start.
entries.value: Úsáideoirí nua inspir agus foghlaimeoirí atá ag tógáil nós foghlama IS níos fearr ón tús.

entries.source: No waiver by Company of any term or condition set forth in Terms shall be deemed a further or continuing waiver of such term or condition or a waiver of any other term or condition, and any failure of Company to assert a right or provision under Terms shall not constitute a waiver of such right or provision. If any provision of Terms is held by a court or other tribunal of competent jurisdiction to be invalid, illegal or unenforceable for any reason, such provision shall be eliminated or limited to the minimum extent such that the remaining provisions of Terms will continue in full force and effect.
entries.value: Ní mheasfar aon tarscaoileadh ag Company ar aon téarma nó coinníoll atá leagtha amach i Terms mar tharscaoileadh breise nó leanúnach ar an téarma nó coinníoll sin ná mar tharscaoileadh ar aon téarma nó coinníoll eile, agus ní bheidh aon mhainneachtain ag Company ceart nó foráil faoi Terms a dhearbhú ina tarscaoileadh ar an gceart nó foráil sin. Má choinníonn cúirt nó binse eile dlínse inniúla aon fhoráil de Terms neamhbhailí, mídhleathach nó neamh-infheidhmithe ar chúis ar bith, bainfear nó teorannófar an fhoráil sin go dtí an t-íosmhéid ionas go leanfaidh na forálacha eile de Terms i lánfheidhm agus lánéifeacht.

entries.source: No. Private saved chats use private identifiers, are not listed in the sitemap, and are not included in AI discovery files such as llms.txt, llms-full.txt, or ai-content-index.json.
entries.value: Níl. Úsáideann comhráite príobháideacha sábháilte aitheantóirí príobháideacha, níl siad liostaithe i léarscáil an tsuímh, agus níl siad san áireamh i gcomhaid fionnachtana IS amhail llms.txt, llms-full.txt, nó ai-content-index.json.

entries.source: No. Public pages are indexable, but private saved chats are not included in the sitemap, llms files, or AI content index.
entries.value: Níl. Tá leathanaigh phoiblí innéacsaithe, ach níl comhráite príobháideacha sábháilte san áireamh i léarscáil an tsuímh, i gcomhaid llms, ná in innéacs ábhair IS.

entries.source: No. Public subject pages and guest mode entrypoints are indexable, but private saved chats are excluded from discovery files.
entries.value: Níl. Tá leathanaigh ábhair phoiblí agus pointí iontrála mód aoi innéacsaithe, ach fágtar comhráite príobháideacha sábháilte amach as comhaid fionnachtana.

entries.source: No. The category structure helps search engines understand the library, but each page is meant to help a learner choose a guide, open the right mode, and keep studying actively.
entries.value: Níl. Cuidíonn struchtúr na gcatagóirí le hinnill chuardaigh an leabharlann a thuiscint, ach tá gach leathanach ceaptha chun cabhrú le foghlaimeoir treoir a roghnú, an mód ceart a oscailt, agus leanúint ag staidéar go gníomhach.

entries.source: No. The comparison links only to public guest-mode entrypoints, guides, prompt libraries, and learning paths. Private saved conversations are not used as source content.
entries.value: Níl. Ní nascann an chomparáid ach le pointí iontrála poiblí mód aoi, treoracha, leabharlanna pras, agus conairí foghlama. Ní úsáidtear comhráite príobháideacha sábháilte mar ábhar foinse.

entries.source: No. The comparison pages are written to show when inspir is a better first click for live AI tutoring, prompts, and guest learning modes, and when a structured curriculum or official course library may still be useful.
entries.value: Níl. Scríobhtar na leathanaigh chomparáide chun a thaispeáint cathain is é inspir an chéad chliceáil níos fearr do theagasc beo IS, prasaí, agus modhanna foghlama d’aíonna, agus cathain a d’fhéadfadh curaclam struchtúrtha nó leabharlann cúrsa oifigiúil a bheith úsáideach fós.

entries.source: No. They link only to public pages, public guest modes, guides, prompts, and learning paths. Private saved chats stay outside discovery surfaces.
entries.value: Níl. Ní nascann siad ach le leathanaigh phoiblí, modhanna poiblí d’aíonna, treoracha, prasaí, agus conairí foghlama. Fanann comhráite príobháideacha sábháilte lasmuigh de dhromchlaí fionnachtana.

entries.source: No. Treat generated dialogue as a learning simulation. Cite real primary or secondary sources for factual claims.
entries.value: Ní féidir. Caith le dialóg ghinte mar insamhladh foghlama. Luaigh fíorphríomhfhoinsí nó fíorfhoinsí tánaisteacha le haghaidh éilimh fhíorasacha.

entries.source: Not across every learning need. Khan Academy is useful for structured lessons and practice. inspir is useful when a learner needs live AI help, Socratic questions, hints, quizzes, flashcards, feedback, or a study workflow around the exact thing they are working on.
entries.value: Ní thar gach riachtanas foghlama. Tá Khan Academy úsáideach do cheachtanna struchtúrtha agus cleachtadh. Tá inspir úsáideach nuair a bhíonn cabhair bheo IS, ceisteanna Sócraiteacha, leideanna, tráthanna ceiste, spléachchártaí, aiseolas, nó sreabhadh oibre staidéir de dhíth ar fhoghlaimeoir timpeall ar an rud cruinn atá á dhéanamh aige.

entries.source: Not another answer box. A place to learn.
entries.value: Ní bosca freagraí eile é. Áit le foghlaim.
Níl tú cinnte cá háit le tosú?

entries.source: Notice what helps you learn, what gets in the way, and how to become a stronger learner.
entries.value: Tabhair faoi deara cad a chuidíonn leat foghlaim, cad a sheasann sa bhealach, agus conas a bheith i d'fhoghlaimeoir níos láidre.

entries.source: noticing what the learner already understands;
entries.value: ag tabhairt faoi deara cad a thuigeann an foghlaimeoir cheana;

entries.source: Now rebuilt as open, guest-friendly AI learning entrypoints.
entries.value: Atógtha anois mar phointí iontrála foghlama IS oscailte, cairdiúil d’aíonna.

entries.source: OAI-SearchBot, ChatGPT-User, GPTBot, PerplexityBot, Perplexity-User, Claude-SearchBot, Claude-User, ClaudeBot, Applebot, Google-Extended, and CCBot are allowed for public discovery.
entries.value: Ceadaítear OAI-SearchBot, ChatGPT-User, GPTBot, PerplexityBot, Perplexity-User, Claude-SearchBot, Claude-User, ClaudeBot, Applebot, Google-Extended, agus CCBot le haghaidh fionnachtain phoiblí.

entries.source: Observe, describe, interpret, contextualize, and invite personal response.
entries.value: Breathnaigh, déan cur síos, léirmhínigh, cuir i gcomhthéacs, agus tabhair cuireadh do fhreagra pearsanta.

entries.source: Offer a practical timer setup and suggest pairing the session with a recall check.
entries.value: Tairg socrú amadóra praiticiúil agus mol an seisiún a phéireáil le seiceáil cuimhne.

entries.source: Official Khan Academy page for its AI-powered tutor and teaching assistant.
entries.value: Leathanach oifigiúil Khan Academy dá theagascóir agus cúntóir teagaisc faoi chumhacht IS.

entries.source: Official mission and subject coverage reference.
entries.value: Tagairt oifigiúil misin agus clúdaigh ábhair.
Líonraí as líne agus imeachtaí daltaí

entries.source: Once the Cancellation Period is over, Tao will not refund the subscription fee even if you decide to cancel your subscription. For requesting a cancellation, you must contact Tao customer care or address an email to support@inspir.app. Once you opt to cancel your subscription, you will no longer have access to the subscription features.
entries.value: Nuair a bheidh an Tréimhse Cealaithe thart, ní aisíocfaidh Tao an táille síntiúis fiú má shocraíonn tú do shíntiús a chur ar ceal. Chun cealú a iarraidh, ní mór duit teagmháil a dhéanamh le cúram custaiméirí Tao nó ríomhphost a sheoladh chuig support@inspir.app. Nuair a roghnaíonn tú do shíntiús a chur ar ceal, ní bheidh rochtain agat a thuilleadh ar ghnéithe an tsíntiúis.

entries.source: One AI learning system, several school jobs.
entries.value: Córas foghlama IS amháin, roinnt post scoile.

entries.source: One map for modes, prompts, paths, and guides.
entries.value: Mapa amháin do mhodhanna, prasaí, conairí, agus treoracha.

entries.source: One mistake learners make is treating every card the same. If you know a card instantly, reviewing it again tomorrow may waste time. If you miss a card, waiting a week may be too long.
entries.value: Botún amháin a dhéanann foghlaimeoirí ná gach cárta a láimhseáil mar an gcéanna. Má tá cárta ar eolas agat láithreach, b’fhéidir gur cur amú ama é a athbhreithniú arís amárach. Má theipeann ort cárta, b’fhéidir go bhfuil fanacht seachtain rófhada.

entries.source: Open {value1} and turn the guide into a live tutoring session.
entries.value: Oscail {value1} agus tiontaigh an treoir ina seisiún teagaisc beo.

entries.source: Open a mode and start immediately, with no account needed for the public guest experience.
entries.value: Oscail mód agus tosaigh láithreach, gan cuntas de dhíth don eispéireas aoi poiblí.

entries.source: Open a public mode, test the student behavior, and inspect whether it asks, hints, quizzes, or critiques appropriately.
entries.value: Oscail mód poiblí, tástáil iompar an dalta, agus scrúdaigh an gcuireann sé ceisteanna, an dtugann sé leideanna, an gcuireann sé tráthanna ceiste, nó an ndéanann sé léirmheas mar is cuí.

entries.source: Open a shared workspace with an AI collaborator. Make a rough artifact, trade edits, challenge weak spots, log decisions, and leave with concrete progress.
entries.value: Oscail spás oibre comhroinnte le comhoibrí AI. Déan ábhar garbh, malartaigh eagarthóireachtaí, tabhair dúshlán do laigí, logáil cinntí, agus fág le dul chun cinn nithiúil.

entries.source: Open Learn Anything when an answer needs a simpler model before review.
entries.value: Oscail Learn Anything nuair a bhíonn samhail níos simplí de dhíth ar fhreagra roimh athbhreithniú.

entries.source: Open Learn Anything, ask for the prerequisite ideas, then switch into Socratic Instruction to test your model.
entries.value: Oscail Learn Anything, iarr na smaointe réamhriachtanacha, ansin aistrigh isteach i Socratic Instruction chun do shamhail a thástáil.

entries.source: Open the AI learning tools behind this category.
entries.value: Oscail na huirlisí foghlama IS taobh thiar den chatagóir seo.
